subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Due to lack of time I pen but a brief response, and seek forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت مختصر مرقوم میگردد طلب مغفرت
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for forgiveness
